caption: In a studio setting, a man wearing a white dress shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, and a large, grey, peaked wig speaks into a professional microphone while wearing black over-ear headphones. The background features a wall with framed photos, clothing on mannequins, and various apparel. Two logos are visible on screen: one on the left reading "THE TALK PODCAST" and one on the right reading "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man is seen speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which moves from an open position to a raised finger, emphasizing his points. His facial expressions shift as he speaks, maintaining a focused gaze forward. The camera remains static, capturing his upper body and the surrounding studio environment, while the only changes are his speaking movements and hand gestures.
